title: Genealogy of Jesus (Matthew)
summary: Matthew records Jesus’s genealogy from Abraham to Jesus.

title: Genealogy of Jesus (Luke)
summary: Luke records Jesus’s genealogy in connection with Jesus’s baptism.

title: Birth of Jesus
summary: Jesus is born in Bethlehem.

title: Angels and Shepherds
summary: Angels announce Jesus’s birth to shepherds.

title: Visit of the Magi
summary: Wise men worship the newborn king.

title: Flight into Egypt
summary: Joseph takes Mary and Jesus to Egypt for safety.

title: Return to Nazareth
summary: The family settles in Nazareth after Herod’s death.

title: Boy Jesus in the Temple
summary: At age twelve, Jesus is found in the temple.

title: The Word Made Flesh
summary: John introduces Jesus as the eternal Word made flesh.

title: John the Baptist’s Ministry
summary: John prepares the way with repentance and baptism.

title: Baptism of Jesus
summary: Jesus is baptized and affirmed from heaven.

title: Temptation in the Wilderness
summary: Jesus is tempted in the wilderness.

title: First Disciples Called
summary: Jesus begins gathering disciples after John’s witness.

title: Wedding at Cana
summary: Jesus turns water into wine.

title: Cleansing of the Temple (early)
summary: Jesus cleanses the temple early in John’s account.

title: Jesus and Nicodemus
summary: Jesus teaches about being born again.

title: Woman at the Well
summary: Jesus offers living water to the Samaritan woman.

title: Healing the Official’s Son
summary: Jesus heals a son from a distance.

title: Calling of the Fishermen
summary: Jesus calls fishermen to follow him.

title: Teaching in Capernaum Synagogue
summary: Jesus teaches with authority and casts out an unclean spirit.

title: Healing Peter’s Mother-in-law
summary: Jesus heals Peter’s mother-in-law and many others.

title: First Preaching Tour
summary: Jesus travels preaching in Galilee.

title: Cleansing a Leper
summary: Jesus cleanses a leper.

title: Healing the Paralytic
summary: A paralytic is forgiven and healed.

title: Call of Matthew/Levi
summary: Jesus calls Levi and eats with sinners.

title: Question About Fasting
summary: Jesus answers a question about fasting.

title: Healing at Bethesda
summary: Jesus heals a man at Bethesda on the Sabbath.

title: The Son’s Authority
summary: Jesus speaks of his unity with the Father and authority to judge.

title: Plucking Grain on the Sabbath
summary: Jesus teaches that the Son of Man is Lord of the Sabbath.

title: Man with the Withered Hand
summary: Jesus heals on the Sabbath and faces opposition.

title: Choosing the Twelve
summary: Jesus appoints the twelve apostles.

title: Sermon on the Mount / Plain
summary: Jesus teaches kingdom ethics and discipleship.

title: Centurion’s Servant
summary: Jesus heals a centurion’s servant and praises his faith.

title: Widow’s Son at Nain
summary: Jesus raises a widow’s son.

title: John’s Question from Prison
summary: Jesus answers John’s inquiry and honors him.

title: Sinful Woman Anoints Jesus
summary: A repentant woman anoints Jesus and receives forgiveness.

title: Parable of the Sower
summary: The word is received in different kinds of soil.

title: Lamp Under a Basket
summary: Light is meant to be seen.

title: Parable of the Growing Seed
summary: The kingdom grows in hidden ways.

title: Parable of the Mustard Seed
summary: The kingdom grows from small beginnings.

title: Parable of the Leaven
summary: The kingdom works through the whole batch like leaven.

title: Parable of the Weeds
summary: Wheat and weeds grow together until harvest.

title: Hidden Treasure
summary: The kingdom is worth everything to gain.

title: Pearl of Great Price
summary: The kingdom is like a pearl of great value.

title: Parable of the Dragnet
summary: The final sorting is like a dragnet gathering fish.

title: Parable of the Householder
summary: A disciple brings out treasures old and new.

title: Jesus Calms the Storm
summary: Jesus rebukes wind and waves.

title: Gerasene Demoniac
summary: Jesus frees a man oppressed by demons.

title: Jairus’s Daughter and the Woman
summary: Jesus heals a woman and raises Jairus’s daughter.

title: Rejection at Nazareth
summary: Jesus is rejected in his hometown.

title: Sending the Twelve
summary: Jesus sends the twelve to preach and heal.

title: Death of John the Baptist
summary: Herod executes John the Baptist.

title: Feeding of the Five Thousand
summary: Jesus feeds a large crowd with loaves and fish.

title: Walking on Water
summary: Jesus walks on the sea.

title: Bread of Life Discourse
summary: Jesus teaches that he is the bread of life.

title: Traditions and Defilement
summary: Jesus teaches what truly defiles a person.

title: Syrophoenician Woman
summary: Jesus commends a Gentile woman’s faith.

title: Healing a Deaf and Mute Man
summary: Jesus heals a man in the Decapolis.

title: Feeding of the Four Thousand
summary: Jesus feeds four thousand people.

title: Healing a Blind Man at Bethsaida
summary: Jesus heals a blind man in stages.

title: Peter’s Confession
summary: Peter confesses Jesus as the Christ.

title: First Passion Prediction
summary: Jesus predicts his death and calls disciples to take up the cross.

title: Transfiguration
summary: Jesus is revealed in glory before selected disciples.

title: Boy with an Unclean Spirit
summary: Jesus heals a boy after the disciples fail.

title: Second Passion Prediction
summary: Jesus again predicts his death and resurrection.

title: Greatness and a Child
summary: Jesus teaches humility and warns against causing others to stumble.

title: Temple Tax Coin
summary: Jesus provides a coin in a fish’s mouth.

title: Feast of Tabernacles
summary: Jesus teaches publicly at the feast.

title: Woman Caught in Adultery
summary: Jesus responds with mercy and truth.

title: Light of the World
summary: Jesus teaches about his identity and freedom.

title: Man Born Blind
summary: Jesus heals a man blind from birth.

title: Good Shepherd
summary: Jesus teaches about the true shepherd.

title: Sending the Seventy-Two
summary: Jesus sends a larger group of disciples.

title: Good Samaritan
summary: A neighbor is defined by mercy.

title: Mary and Martha
summary: Jesus teaches priority and attentive discipleship.

title: Lord’s Prayer and Persistence
summary: Jesus teaches his disciples how to pray.

title: Parable of the Rich Fool
summary: A warning against greed and false security.

title: Watchful Servants
summary: Jesus calls disciples to readiness.

title: Parable of the Barren Fig Tree
summary: A warning to repent before judgment comes.

title: Healing a Crippled Woman
summary: Jesus heals on the Sabbath in a synagogue.

title: The Narrow Door
summary: Jesus warns that entry into the kingdom is urgent.

title: Parable of the Great Banquet
summary: Those invited refuse; others are brought in.

title: Cost of Discipleship
summary: Jesus teaches the cost of following him.

title: Parable of the Lost Sheep
summary: Heaven rejoices over one who repents.

title: Parable of the Lost Coin
summary: There is joy when the lost is found.

title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
summary: A father welcomes his returning son.

title: Parable of the Unjust Steward
summary: Jesus teaches on wise stewardship.

title: Parable of the Rich Man and Lazarus
summary: A warning about hardness of heart and eternal consequence.

title: Parable of the Persistent Widow
summary: Jesus teaches persistence in prayer.

title: Parable of the Pharisee and Tax Collector
summary: God receives the humble, not the self-righteous.

title: Feast of Dedication
summary: Jesus teaches at the Feast of Dedication.

title: Raising of Lazarus
summary: Jesus raises Lazarus from the dead.

title: Plot to Kill Jesus
summary: The leaders plan Jesus’s death after Lazarus is raised.

title: Marriage and Divorce
summary: Jesus teaches about marriage and divorce.

title: Blessing the Children
summary: Jesus welcomes little children.

title: Rich Young Ruler
summary: A rich ruler asks about eternal life.

title: Parable of the Laborers in the Vineyard
summary: The kingdom reflects the generosity of the master.

title: Third Passion Prediction
summary: Jesus again predicts his coming suffering.

title: Request of James and John
summary: Jesus teaches servant leadership.

title: Healing Near Jericho
summary: Jesus heals blind beggars near Jericho.

title: Zacchaeus
summary: Jesus brings salvation to Zacchaeus’s house.

title: Parable of the Minas
summary: Faithful stewardship is rewarded.

title: Anointing at Bethany
summary: Jesus is anointed in preparation for burial.

title: Triumphal Entry
summary: Jesus enters Jerusalem publicly as king.

title: Fig Tree
summary: Jesus curses the fig tree and teaches about faith.

title: Cleansing of the Temple
summary: Jesus cleanses the temple during the final week.

title: Question of Authority
summary: Jesus is challenged about his authority.

title: Parable of the Two Sons
summary: Obedience matters more than profession.

title: Parable of the Wicked Tenants
summary: Jesus warns the leaders through a vineyard parable.

title: Parable of the Wedding Feast
summary: Many are invited, but response matters.

title: Tribute to Caesar
summary: Jesus answers the question about taxes.

title: Question About Resurrection
summary: Jesus answers the Sadducees about resurrection.

title: Great Commandment
summary: Jesus summarizes the law in love for God and neighbor.

title: Woes to the Scribes and Pharisees
summary: Jesus denounces hypocrisy and blindness.

title: Widow’s Offering
summary: Jesus honors the widow’s sacrificial gift.

title: Greeks Seek Jesus
summary: Jesus speaks of glorification through death.

title: Olivet Discourse
summary: Jesus teaches about coming judgment and readiness.

title: Parable of the Ten Virgins
summary: Jesus teaches readiness for his coming.

title: Parable of the Talents
summary: Faithful servants are commended.

title: Sheep and Goats
summary: Final judgment is pictured in terms of compassion and obedience.

title: Judas Agrees to Betray
summary: Judas arranges to betray Jesus.

title: Last Supper
summary: Jesus shares his final meal with the disciples.

title: Farewell Discourse
summary: Jesus teaches and comforts his disciples before his death.

title: Prayer in Gethsemane
summary: Jesus prays before his arrest.

title: Arrest of Jesus
summary: Jesus is arrested in the garden.

title: Before Jewish Authorities
summary: Jesus is questioned before the high priest and council.

title: Peter Denies Jesus
summary: Peter denies knowing Jesus three times.

title: Death of Judas
summary: Judas’s betrayal ends in despair and death.

title: Before Pilate and Herod
summary: Jesus is tried before Roman authorities.

title: Crucifixion
summary: Jesus is crucified.

title: Burial of Jesus
summary: Jesus is buried in the tomb.

title: Resurrection Morning
summary: The tomb is found empty and Jesus rises.

title: Road to Emmaus
summary: The risen Jesus appears to two disciples.

title: Appearance to the Disciples
summary: Jesus appears to the gathered disciples.

title: Jesus and Thomas
summary: Thomas believes after seeing the risen Christ.

title: Breakfast by the Sea
summary: The risen Jesus appears by the Sea of Galilee.

title: Great Commission
summary: Jesus commissions his disciples.
